message:
fix(tests): update proptest_search_orchestrator for new fields + corpus fixture expectations

- Add EmbedderDispatch and vector_index_backend to proptest_search_orchestrator strategy
  (fields added in 5659eaf0 and b41c2921 but test strategy was not updated)
- Update 3 pattern corpus fixtures (overloaded_v2, usage_reached, usage_reached_v2) to
  include newly-matched rate_limit.detected rules from broader pattern engine coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +1,46 @@
 [
   {
-    "rule_id": "claude_code.error.overloaded",
     "agent_type": "claude_code",
-    "event_type": "error.overloaded",
-    "severity": "warning",
     "confidence": 0.95,
+    "event_type": "error.overloaded",
     "extracted": {
       "retry_after": "60"
     },
-    "matched_text": "too many requests to API. Will retry in 60 seconds"
+    "matched_text": "too many requests to API. Will retry in 60 seconds",
+    "rule_id": "claude_code.error.overloaded",
+    "severity": "warning"
+  },
+  {
+    "agent_type": "claude_code",
+    "confidence": 0.95,
+    "event_type": "rate_limit.detected",
+    "extracted": {
+      "retry_after": "60 seconds"
+    },
+    "matched_text": "retry in 60 seconds",
+    "rule_id": "claude_code.rate_limit.detected",
+    "severity": "critical"
+  },
+  {
+    "agent_type": "codex",
+    "confidence": 0.95,
+    "event_type": "rate_limit.detected",
+    "extracted": {
+      "retry_after": "60 seconds"
+    },
+    "matched_text": "retry in 60 seconds",
+    "rule_id": "codex.rate_limit.detected",
+    "severity": "critical"
+  },
+  {
+    "agent_type": "gemini",
+    "confidence": 0.95,
+    "event_type": "rate_limit.detected",
+    "extracted": {
+      "retry_after": "60 seconds"
+    },
+    "matched_text": "retry in 60 seconds",
+    "rule_id": "gemini.rate_limit.detected",
+    "severity": "critical"
   }
 ]
